channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 16th April

item.title: Car parked here for 6 months. No MOT, 16th April
item.description:
Car parked for 6 months no mot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Tivoli Walk, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 16th April
item.description:
28/03/26 email rcvd (attached) regarding issues with recent gully cleansing on Back Lane
Report on FixMyStreet
